login_subtitle: Sign in to your Soulbits Cloud account
loginErrorInvalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
loginErrorEmailNotVerified: Please verify your email before signing in. Check your inbox for the verification email.
loginErrorGeneric: Sign in failed. Please try again.
loginLinkRegister: Don't have an account? Sign Up
displayNamePlaceholder: How you want to be called
registerSuccessMessage: We've sent a verification email to {{email}}. Please click the link to verify your account before signing in.
registerLinkLogin: Already have an account? Sign In
verify_message: Your email has not been verified yet. Please check your inbox for the verification email.
verify_resendSuccess: Verification email sent! Please check your inbox.
verify_resendError: Failed to resend verification email. Please try again.
googleErrorPlayServices: Google Play Services are not available on this device. Please use email/password to sign in.
googleErrorDeveloperError: Google Sign-In is not configured yet. Please use email/password to sign in.
googleErrorEmailConflict: This email is already registered with another sign-in method. Please sign in using that method.
googleErrorGeneric: Google Sign-In failed. Please try again.
appleErrorNotConfigured: Apple Sign-In is not available on this device. Please use email/password to sign in.
appleErrorEmailConflict: This email is already registered with another sign-in method. Please sign in using that method.
appleErrorGeneric: Apple Sign-In failed. Please try again.
mode_description: Choose how you want to connect to Harmony Link
mode_selfhosted_desc: Connect to your own Harmony Link server on your local network
mode_cloud_desc: Connect through the Soulbits Cloud service
switch_warning_message_cloud: Switching to Soulbits Cloud will sync from your cloud session. Your self-hosted data stays on your device. Some provider settings (API keys) won't move between sources automatically — you may need to re-select them.
switch_warning_message_selfhosted: Switching to a self-hosted Harmony Link will sync from your local device. Your cloud data stays in your cloud session.
